# Executable Search Path Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/executablesearchpath -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Daemon Config Reference](../config-reference.md)

Executable SSOT: [`executable-search-path.riido.json`](executable-search-path.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `executable-search-path-evidence`.

Proves provider executable discovery and child process PATH propagation without relying on launchd/Desktop inherited PATH assumptions.

## Search Order

| Order | Source | Meaning | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | process PATH | explicit operator PATH wins before augmented directories | `process-path-first`, `lookpath-first` |
| 2 | login-shell PATH | user login-shell PATH is read once per process and skipped safely when unavailable | `login-shell-read`, `login-shell-cache`, `login-shell-timeout` |
| 3 | well-known install dirs | Homebrew, local user bins, language toolchain bins, provider bins, and Node version manager bins are appended | `well-known-homebrew`, `well-known-user`, `well-known-provider`, `node-version-manager` |

## Rules

| Rule | Meaning | Behavior | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| override pins executable | RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH resolves only that file | `override_only` | `override-only` |
| missing override fails closed | invalid RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH never falls back to PATH | `override_fail_closed` | `override-fail-closed` |
| spawn inherits launch PATH | child process env receives frozen launch PATH when the spawn env has no PATH | `spawn_launch_path` | `env-map-launch-path`, `env-list-launch-path` |
| explicit spawn PATH preserved | caller-provided PATH is preserved instead of overwritten | `spawn_explicit_path` | `env-map-preserve-path`, `env-list-preserve-path` |
| selected executable reaches provider start | runtime-selected executable and launch PATH are passed into BuildStart/spawn | `source-check` | `detected-executable-spawn`, `bridge-spawn-path` |

## Assertions

- explicit provider executable overrides are pins and fail closed
- minimal daemon PATH is widened for unset overrides
- provider child processes receive a launch PATH when no explicit spawn PATH exists
- reader documentation is generated from this manifest
